category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Botswana market (BOBS conformity, BOS/IEC standards, energy label, BOCRA radio approval).

title.en: China-to-Botswana LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入博茨瓦纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入波札那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Botswana market-access requirements: BOBS (Botswana Bureau of Standards) conformity and BOS import inspection, BOS/IEC 60598 and IEC 62560/62471 safety and photobiological standards, the national energy labelling programme, and BOCRA radio-type approval for wireless luminaires, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Botswana adopts IEC/SANS-based BOS standards and has no EU-style horizontal RoHS or chemical-notification regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与博茨瓦纳市场准入要求差距对照：BOBS（博茨瓦纳标准局）符合性及 BOS 进口检验、BOS/IEC 60598 及 IEC 62560/62471 安全与光生物标准、国家能效标签项目，以及无线灯具的 BOCRA 无线电型号核准，并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。博茨瓦纳采用基于 IEC/SANS 的 BOS 标准，无欧盟式横向 RoHS 或化学品通报制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與波札那市場准入要求差距對照：BOBS（波札那標準局）符合性及 BOS 進口檢驗、BOS/IEC 60598 及 IEC 62560/62471 安全與光生物標準、國家能效標籤項目，以及無線燈具的 BOCRA 無線電型號核准，並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。波札那採用基於 IEC/SANS 的 BOS 標準，無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 或化學品通報制度。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Botswana law, BOBS conformity-assessment and import-inspection requirements, applicable BOS/IEC standards, energy labelling rules, and BOCRA radio requirements with qualified professionals and the relevant Botswana authorities before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及博茨瓦纳相关主管机构核验现行博茨瓦纳法律、BOBS 合格评定及进口检验要求、适用的 BOS/IEC 标准、能效标签规则及 BOCRA 无线电要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及波札那相關主管機構核驗現行波札那法律、BOBS 合格評定及進口檢驗要求、適用的 BOS/IEC 標準、能效標籤規則及 BOCRA 無線電要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Botswana should expect conformity assessment and import inspection administered by the Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS) for regulated electrical/lighting products, against BOS standards that adopt IEC (and frequently SANS) requirements: electrical safety to BOS/IEC 60598 (luminaires) and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted lamps); photobiological safety referencing IEC 62471; and EMC/radio-disturbance to the IEC/CISPR-aligned BOS standard. Botswana operates a national energy-efficiency labelling programme for lamps (mapping to what the EU would handle via Ecodesign/energy label) — confirm current scope and registration with BOBS. Smart/wireless luminaires additionally require BOCRA (Botswana Communications Regulatory Authority) radio-type approval. An in-country importer of record is typically needed, and goods route via Durban or Walvis Bay as Botswana is landlocked. Note the 230 V / 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V). Crucially, Botswana has NO EU-style horizontal RoHS, REACH/SVHC, or battery/outdoor-noise regime — those EU obligations have no Botswana counterpart, so China GB/CCC documentation must be re-mapped to the BOBS conformity route rather than assumed equivalent.
answer_first.zh: 向博茨瓦纳出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商应预期：受管制电气/照明产品由博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）进行合格评定及进口检验，依据采用 IEC（并常采用 SANS）要求的 BOS 标准：电气安全依 BOS/IEC 60598（灯具）及 IEC 62560（自镇流灯）；光生物安全引用 IEC 62471；EMC/无线电骚扰依与 IEC/CISPR 对齐的 BOS 标准。博茨瓦纳为灯具实施国家能效标签项目（对应欧盟由生态设计/能效标签处理的内容）——请向 BOBS 确认现行范围及注册要求。智能/无线灯具还须取得 BOCRA（博茨瓦纳通信监管局）无线电型号核准。通常需要在地进口记录人，且因博茨瓦纳为内陆国，货物经德班或沃尔维斯湾转运。注意 230 V / 50 Hz 电网（50 Hz 与中国相同；标称电压不同于中国的 220/380 V）。关键在于，博茨瓦纳没有欧盟式横向 RoHS、REACH/SVHC 或电池/户外噪声制度——这些欧盟义务在博茨瓦纳无对应要求，因此中国 GB/CCC 文件须重新映射至 BOBS 合格评定路径，而不能假定等效。
answer_first.zht: 向波札那出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商應預期：受管制電氣/照明產品由波札那標準局（BOBS）進行合格評定及進口檢驗，依據採用 IEC（並常採用 SANS）要求的 BOS 標準：電氣安全依 BOS/IEC 60598（燈具）及 IEC 62560（自鎮流燈）；光生物安全引用 IEC 62471；EMC/無線電騷擾依與 IEC/CISPR 對齊的 BOS 標準。波札那為燈具實施國家能效標籤項目（對應歐盟由生態設計/能效標籤處理的內容）——請向 BOBS 確認現行範圍及注冊要求。智能/無線燈具還須取得 BOCRA（波札那通信監管局）無線電型號核准。通常需要在地進口記錄人，且因波札那為內陸國，貨物經德班或沃爾維斯灣轉運。注意 230 V / 50 Hz 電網（50 Hz 與中國相同；標稱電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V）。關鍵在於，波札那沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS、REACH/SVHC 或電池/戶外噪聲制度——這些歐盟義務在波札那無對應要求，因此中國 GB/CCC 文件須重新映射至 BOBS 合格評定路徑，而不能假定等效。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on any change to BOBS conformity-assessment scope, BOS/IEC standard adoptions, the Botswana energy-labelling programme, or BOCRA radio requirements.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Botswana market-access facts (BOBS regulated-product scope, energy-label scope, BOCRA applicability) must be re-verified against current BOBS/BOCRA guidance on each review cycle; the absence of an EU-style horizontal RoHS/REACH regime must be re-confirmed rather than assumed permanent.
